AFTER BOTH COUNSEL CONFERED WITH THE COURT, PLTF MOVED TO DISMISS THE CASE WITH PREJUDICE, MOTION GRANTED. JURY RELEASED FROM THE ADMONITION, JURY DISCHARGED, THANKED AND EXCUSED, COURT ORDERED REMAINDER OF JURY DUTY EXCUSED, CLERK SO INFORMED JURY ROOM. JURY PAID FOR TODAY. ALL EXHIBITS WITHDRAWN AND RETURNED TO BOTH COUNSEL. PLTF. TO PREPARE DISMISSAL AND PLTF'S REQUEST TO HAVE PERDIEM POSTED FOR TODAY REFUNDED TO HIM, GRANTED, PLTF. TO PREPARE THE ORDER.
